name: Bright, Calm Woods
description: A peaceful woodland near town, home to weaker creatures.

name: The Country
description: Rolling farmlands stretching out from the city walls.

name: The Plains
description: Vast open grasslands where danger lurks with no cover.

name: The Seashore
description: Rocky coastline battered by waves, hiding aquatic threats.

name: The Lost Caves
description: Dark twisting caverns beneath the mountains. Many enter, few return.

name: The Jagged Peaks
description: Treacherous mountain passes where only the bravest dare climb.

name: The King's Garden
description: An enchanted garden hiding ancient and powerful creatures.
